item.title: Tapestries. Swipe for the drawings :) Many of you have been asking to elaborate ...
item.description:
🖼️ Slideshow (6 medier)

@gaiaesthermaria

Tapestries. Swipe for the drawings :)
Many of you have been asking to elaborate a bit more about my process: I often start from a concept and begin the process by drawing an abstract shape (dot - line - surface) floating on the negative space of the paper. Then I move, as fast as 12 drawing per second, as wide as the space of my paper.
#animatedshortfilm #handdrawnanimation #2danimation #surreal #traditionalanimation

Se slideshow på Instagram

@gaiaesthermaria

Tapestries. Swipe for the drawings :)
Many of you have been asking to elaborate a bit more about my process: I often start from a concept and begin the process by drawing an abstract shape (dot - line - surface) floating on the negative space of the paper. Then I move, as fast as 12 drawing per second, as wide as the space of my paper.
#animatedshortfilm #handdrawnanimation #2danimation #surreal #traditionalanimation

item.title: I had the privilege of collaborating with @themuseumofmodernart , bringing to li...
item.description:
🖼️ Slideshow (5 medier)

@gaiaesthermaria

I had the privilege of collaborating with @themuseumofmodernart , bringing to life a somatic exercise, recited by somatic therapist Emily Price on how to process overwhelming feelings raised by looking at art. I wanted to represent an everchanging shapeshifting inscape, that could mimick the kynetic of our own feelings - often slippery and difficult to get a hold of. With something like 2000 straight ahead drawings 😵‍💫.
Find a snippet here, some more soon. Perhaps you can also take the exercise? ☺️
#artist #drawing #animation #somaticexercise #traditionalanimation #handdrawn #handdrawnanimation #2danimation #moma #framebyframe #framebyframeanimation #morphing #surreal #paper #charcoal #oilpastels #coloredpencils #paper
Many thanks to DaeQuan Alexander Collier and Arlette Hernandez @wokegrandma for their trust and work ♥️

Se slideshow på Instagram
item.content:encoded:
🖼️ Slideshow (5 medier)

@gaiaesthermaria

I had the privilege of collaborating with @themuseumofmodernart , bringing to life a somatic exercise, recited by somatic therapist Emily Price on how to process overwhelming feelings raised by looking at art. I wanted to represent an everchanging shapeshifting inscape, that could mimick the kynetic of our own feelings - often slippery and difficult to get a hold of. With something like 2000 straight ahead drawings 😵‍💫.
Find a snippet here, some more soon. Perhaps you can also take the exercise? ☺️
#artist #drawing #animation #somaticexercise #traditionalanimation #handdrawn #handdrawnanimation #2danimation #moma #framebyframe #framebyframeanimation #morphing #surreal #paper #charcoal #oilpastels #coloredpencils #paper
Many thanks to DaeQuan Alexander Collier and Arlette Hernandez @wokegrandma for their trust and work ♥️

Se slideshow på Instagram
item.author: gaiaesthermaria

item.title: Gosh! For @newyorkermag ! 😍 Humble barefoot pigeons captured in a dignifying Etr...
item.description:
🖼️ Slideshow (4 medier)

@gaiaesthermaria

Gosh! For @newyorkermag ! 😍
Humble barefoot pigeons captured in a dignifying Etruscan stance ✨
I looped (hand drawn straight ahead - swipe for the papers) a small flock of pigeons to go with “Pigeon toes” a piece by author Ian Frazier- out also on print in the 12 May issue - the mag centenary! Link in bio 🐦 #artist #drawing #animation #handdrawn #handdrawnanimation #framebyframe #framebyframeanimation #traditionalanimation #2danimation #pigeons #animals #morphing #sureeal #loop #newyorker #paper #coloredpencils #illustration many thanks for the trust to AD @supriyakalidas ♥️

Se slideshow på Instagram

@gaiaesthermaria

Gosh! For @newyorkermag ! 😍
Humble barefoot pigeons captured in a dignifying Etruscan stance ✨
I looped (hand drawn straight ahead - swipe for the papers) a small flock of pigeons to go with “Pigeon toes” a piece by author Ian Frazier- out also on print in the 12 May issue - the mag centenary! Link in bio 🐦 #artist #drawing #animation #handdrawn #handdrawnanimation #framebyframe #framebyframeanimation #traditionalanimation #2danimation #pigeons #animals #morphing #sureeal #loop #newyorker #paper #coloredpencils #illustration many thanks for the trust to AD @supriyakalidas ♥️

item.title: Yup I made the cover of June 2nd issue of @nytmag ❤️ 🐶 It was a pleasure for me ...
item.description:
🖼️ Slideshow (3 medier)

@gaiaesthermaria

Yup I made the cover of June 2nd issue of @nytmag ❤️ 🐶
It was a pleasure for me to illustrate and animate a story about animals, death and love, written by Sam Anderson (@shamblanderson )
Thank you so much @annie76828 - best ad ever for the trust and the beautiful work together🥹. And all the nyt mag team!
LINK IN BIO for full story and animations! 🐹🐶
#artist #drawing #animation #framebyframeanimation #2danimation #nyt #cover #handdrawn #handdrawnanimation #traditionalanimation #dog #animals #paper #oilpastel #charcoal #illustration

Se slideshow på Instagram
